Back to tours

Canopy Los Cañones

Fly above the rainforest in Arenal's most thrilling zipline adventure. Canopy Los Cañones is one of La Fortuna's most complete and exhilarating rainforest adventures. With 12 cables and 13 platforms covering 2.8 km, experience the thrill of soaring between giant trees, deep ravines and lush vegetation. Encounter howler monkeys, toucans, sloths, coatis and exotic birds. After the zipline course, enjoy free access to hot and cold pools, crocodile farms and a butterfly garden.

Duration: 2 hours

Location: La Fortuna, Costa Rica

Difficulty: Moderate

Price: $125

ZiplineCanopyAdventureAdrenalineRainforestWildlifeSafetyProfessional guidesNatureOutdoor activities
Book via WhatsApp

Description

Fly above the rainforest in Arenal's most thrilling zipline adventure. Canopy Los Cañones is one of La Fortuna's most complete and exhilarating rainforest adventures. With 12 cables and 13 platforms covering 2.8 km, experience the thrill of soaring between giant trees, deep ravines and lush vegetation. Encounter howler monkeys, toucans, sloths, coatis and exotic birds. After the zipline course, enjoy free access to hot and cold pools, crocodile farms and a butterfly garden.

Tour Description

Fly above the rainforest in Arenal's most thrilling zipline adventure. Canopy Los Cañones is one of La Fortuna's most complete and exhilarating rainforest adventures. With 12 cables and 13 platforms covering 2.8 km, experience the thrill of soaring between giant trees, deep ravines and lush vegetation. Encounter howler monkeys, toucans, sloths, coatis and exotic birds. After the zipline course, enjoy free access to hot and cold pools, crocodile farms and a butterfly garden.
